channel.title: Grain Journal
channel.description: Fresh takes for film photographers shooting analog.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of film stocks
item.description: The most common early stumbles in film stocks, and the cheap corrections that fix them for film photographers shooting analog.

item.title: "film camera under 200" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about film camera under 200 through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your scanning questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the scanning questions film photographers shooting analog keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in developing with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest developing adjustments that film photographers shooting analog report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: film camera under 200
item.description: The persistent myths around film camera under 200, stress-tested against what film photographers shooting analog actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your cameras in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying cameras project for film photographers shooting analog — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/AnalogCommunity is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the scanning community this week.

item.title: The developing checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified developing purchase from an expensive mood.
